problem id: d85d7964
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  01111100 -> 11011101
  00011001 -> 11000100
  10010001 -> 11000100
  10001100 -> 00100010
  10011100 -> 10101010
  10000100 -> 01100110
  00001111 -> 01111111
  11011001 -> 10100010
  10001000 -> 00000000
  10100000 -> 01010101

query: 11011000
predicted answer: 10101010
